_note: Illustrative curated snapshot for a prototype.
chunks: What's in the kit: Each impression kit includes impression trays, several batches of putty (base and catalyst), a cheek retractor, and a step-by-step guide. If anything is missing or the putty is dried out, contact support for a free replacement.
Taking good impressions: Mix equal parts base and catalyst quickly, load the tray, and seat it firmly over your teeth for the full timing in the guide. Do not move the tray while the putty sets.
Retake impressions: If your impressions are unclear, our review team will ask you to retake them and send a free retake kit. This is common and does not mean anything is wrong.
Damaged or defective kit: If your kit arrives damaged, broken, or with hardened putty, we will send a replacement at no cost. Send a photo to support to speed up the replacement.
Returning the impressions: Use the prepaid mailer included in your kit to send your completed impressions back to our lab for review.
